extraction.one_line_summary: VAN AERT Wout won the Champs-Élysées sprint after VINGEGAARD Jonas humorously attacked in the yellow jersey before the official start.
tactical_patterns: Vingegaard attacked ceremonially before km 0 with Pogacar/Van Aert/Gescht, forcing GC riders to respond before realizing it was theater.
Van Aert claimed green jersey with sufficient dominance to afford ceremonial attacks on final stage despite sprint preparation.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: comfortable enough to launch fake attack with rivals pre-race, showing psychological dominance after three-week battle
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: positive: won final sprint while wearing green jersey after dominant points classification, double celebration
rider_signals.GESCHT Simon: neutral: called up for polka-dot photos despite finishing second in KOM, missed winning competition by single breakaway
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: third overall at age 36 represents career-best Grand Tour numbers, not decline management
